criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance financial management features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and official documentation.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall usability and design quality of the app, including ease of navigation and visual appeal.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app store ratings, and expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of financial management tools offered by the app, such as budgeting, investing, and savings automation.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: Security Measures
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's security protocols to protect user data and financial information.
criteria.sources: App documentation, security certifications, and expert reviews.

criteria.name: Cost Efficiency
criteria.description: The value provided by the app relative to its cost, including availability of free versions and pricing of premium features.
criteria.sources: App pricing information, user reviews, and expert analyses.
